title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.040 - Abstract of returns
text:
65.040.  Abstract of returns. — The clerk of the county commission shall cause an abstract of the returns of said election to be made out and certified as in election for state and county officers and* record the same at length upon the records of the county commission of the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 13930, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12253; 1919 § 13166; 1909 § 11654 
*A comma appears instead of "and" in original rolls.
